slides.title: Cloud Migration Strategy
slides.subtitle: Q3 readiness review for the leadership team

slides.title: Why now
bullets: Our on-premise contract renewal is in 9 months and the renewal will cost approximately 2.3 million dollars per year
We have observed a significant increase in latency complaints from customers in the EU region in the last two quarters
The competitive landscape has shifted and most of our peers have already moved to cloud-first architectures

slides.title: Current state versus target state
leftBullets: On-premise data centers in three locations across Europe and North America
Manual deployment via legacy CI scripts that the team wrote in 2019
Approximately 14 person quarters per year on infrastructure maintenance work
rightBullets: Cloud-native deployment on AWS and IBM Cloud across two regions
Fully automated CI/CD via GitHub Actions and ArgoCD
Estimated 70 percent reduction in infrastructure maintenance overhead

slides.title: Risks and mitigations
bullets: Data residency concerns for EU customers — mitigated by using EU regions only and adding a residency check in the deployment pipeline
Legacy database dependencies — mitigated by a phased migration approach that starts with stateless services first
Skill gap on the team — mitigated by a 12-week training plan and the planned hiring of two cloud engineers

slides.title: Next steps
bullets: Approve the budget for the three-month discovery phase
Identify the first three services to migrate by the end of Q4
Schedule weekly checkpoint meetings with the program sponsor
